title: YeastPitchOutput
description: Yeast pitch-rate results: target cells, packs required, and whether a starter is recommended.

og_plato.description: Original gravity in degrees Plato (computed from og_sg).

target_rate_m_per_ml_per_plato.description: Industry-standard cell density target, in millions of cells per mL per °P. 0.75 / 1.0 / 1.5 / 2.0 depending on style_type.

target_cells_billion.description: Total viable cells needed for this brew, in billions. target_rate × beer_volume_mL × og_plato.

cells_per_pack_effective_billion.description: Cells per pack after applying the viability percentage, in billions.

packs_needed.description: Fractional packs needed to meet the target. e.g. 1.7 means a single pack falls short.

recommended_pack_count.description: ceil(packs_needed) — the smallest pack count that meets the target without a starter.

has_sufficient.description: True when the brewer's yeast_pack_count is enough to meet the target.

shortfall_billion_cells.description: How many more cells the brewer needs beyond what their on-hand packs supply. Zero if has_sufficient is true.
